Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_A: The app requires gamification to increase user engagement and active learning.
Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_B: The app must use AI to generate plausible, context-aware distractors.
Hickam_Orientation.COMORBID_C: The app must resist standardizing symbol meanings (Ontological Flattening), making 'correctness' inherently unstable.
Hickam_Orientation.LENS: Gamification as Standardized Testing: The assumption that a symbol has only one correct description.

Contrastive_Delta.Pre_State: App was a passive utility for finding and inserting symbols. Custom palettes were purely static.
Contrastive_Delta.Post_State: App includes an active learning 'Study Mode' utilizing the Gemini API to generate dynamic, domain-aware multiple-choice quizzes based on the user's custom palettes.
Contrastive_Delta.Isomorphic_Bridge: AI predictive intent (generating distractors) is converted into deterministic UI state (quiz options array) locally, maintaining SIC 2.1 Compliance.

Martensite_Metrics.Aesthetic_Tension: The solution mounts an interactive learning mechanism on top of a static composer, turning curation into education.
Martensite_Metrics.Intent_Divergence: Diverges from generic 'quiz apps' by generating distractors contextually via AI, rather than using a hardcoded database.
